<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="quick-arr-architecture" name="Architecture Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="1671" dy="963" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-153" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;" value="Request Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="160" x="1760" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-154" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;" value="Automation Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="2060" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-155" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;" value="Download Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="170" x="2440" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-156" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;" value="Library Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="150" x="2440" y="770" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-157" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Local LAN /
Away-to-home VPN access" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="1480" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-158" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Seerr
Movies + TV Requests
(optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="1760" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-159" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="MusicSeerr

(optional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="1760" y="605" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="O_SDc6friCJupPCt87yw-160" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;" value="Jellyfin
